patterns.message: Do not import feature-specific buscar components outside the buscar feature. Promote to components/ if reuse is needed.
Do not import feature-specific alertas components outside the alertas feature. Promote to components/ if reuse is needed.
Do not import feature-specific dashboard components outside the dashboard feature. Promote to components/ if reuse is needed.

no-restricted-syntax.message: STORY-4.3 (TD-FE-004): use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-success) instead of arbitrary hex classes. See frontend/tailwind.config.ts. Override: // eslint-disable-next-line no-restricted-syntax -- reason

STORY-4.3 (TD-FE-004): hardcoded hex in inline style. Use Tailwind className with semantic token, or add a token in tailwind.config.ts. Override: // eslint-disable-next-line no-restricted-syntax -- reason

forbid.message: STORY-2.2 (TD-FE-005): use <Button> from @/components/ui/button. Run `node frontend/scripts/codemod-button.js --dry` to preview migration. Override with `/* eslint-disable-next-line react/forbid-elements */` when intentional (e.g. internal of UI primitive).
